name: Rescue the Adventurer
description: A fellow adventurer is being held captive in the torture chambers. You must find them and escort them back to the entrance.

objectives.description: Escort the prisoner back to the entrance

specialRules.effect: Spawn 2 Zombies every turn until escape

introText: One of our own has been taken. We do not leave anyone behind. Get in, find them, and get out!
victoryText: The rescued adventurer breathes the free air for the first time in weeks. You have saved a soul from Strahd's grasp.
defeatText: The torture continues, and your names are added to the list of the lost.
